name: GetOngoingTimeTrack returns nil on 404 (empty-on-404)
description: Verifies that GetOngoingTimeTrack returns nil/empty instead of an error when the server responds with 404, per ADR-004 and x-hey-empty-on extension

name: GetOngoingTimeTrack returns data on 200
description: Verifies that GetOngoingTimeTrack returns the time track normally when the server responds with 200

name: GetOngoingTimeTrack still errors on 500
description: Verifies that GetOngoingTimeTrack still raises an error for non-404 error codes (empty-on only applies to 404)

name: GetOngoingTimeTrack still errors on 401
description: Verifies that GetOngoingTimeTrack still raises an auth error for 401 (empty-on only applies to 404)
